zh.Snitterfield, Warwickshire, England: 英國瓦維其可爾斯尼特費爾德
zh.Broadhempston, Devon, England: 英國戴文布洛阿德普斯頓
zh.Christchurch Priory Churchyard, Christch: 英國英格蘭多瑟特可利斯丘其可利斯丘其 普利奧利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas West 1st Baron West於1365年10月15日出生在英國哈普爾歐阿韓格時，他的父親Sir Thomas West44歲，母親Alice FitzHerbert26歲。他於1384年5月24日與Joan la Warre在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1346年登記服兵役。他去世於1405年8月17日在英國維爾爾迪斯波利享年39歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭多瑟特可利斯丘其可利斯丘其 普利奧利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas West 1st Baron West于1365年10月15日出生在英国哈普爾歐阿韓格时，他的父亲Sir Thomas West44岁，母亲Alice FitzHerbert26岁。他于1384年5月24日与Joan la Warre在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1346年登记服兵役。他去世于1405年8月17日在英国維爾爾迪斯波利享年39岁，埋葬在英国英格兰多瑟特可利斯丘其可利斯丘其 普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: West
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and German: from Middle English, Middle High German west ‘west’, hence a topographic name for someone who lived to the west of a settlement, or a habitational name for someone who had migrated from further west.
Americanized form of Finnish Vesterinen: from the personal name Vesteri (a short form of Sylvester ) + the surname suffix -nen.

History: This name was brought to North America independently by many bearers in the 17th and 18th centuries. Thomas West, 12th Baron De La Warre, was captain general of Virginia in 1610–11. The state of DE is named for him. One of the earliest permanent settlers was Francis West (1606–92), who came to Duxbury, MA, from Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, in or before 1638.

variants.name: Western
meanings: English: from Middle English westerne ‘western’, denoting ‘(the man from the) west’. Compare West and Wester .
Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Vestern, found in two places, a compound of vest ‘west’ + vin ‘meadow’, denoting a farm to the west.

variants.name: Sylvester
meanings: English and German: from the Middle English and Latin personal name Silvester ‘dweller in the forest’ (a derivative of silva ‘wood’). The name was borne by three popes, including a contemporary of Constantine the Great, and seems to have been first used in England by clerics.

variants.name: Westman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Birgit, Erik, Hilmer, Nels.
Swedish: ornamental or topographic name from (an altered form of) the elements väst ‘west’ + -man. It is also found in Finland.
Americanized form of German Westmann: variant of West , with the addition of Middle High German man ‘man’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas West 1st Baron West was born on 15 October 1365, in Oakhanger, Hampshire, England, his father, Sir Thomas West, was 44 and his mother, Alice FitzHerbert, was 26. He married Joan la Warre on 24 May 1384, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1346. He died on 17 August 1405, in Tisbury, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 39, and was buried in Christchurch Priory, Christchurch, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas West 1st Baron West est né le 15 octobre 1365, à Oakhanger, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas West, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Alice FitzHerbert, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Joan la Warre le 24 mai 1384, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1346. Il est décédé le 17 août 1405, à Tisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à Christchurch Priory, Christchurch, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat am 24. Mai 1384 in Devon, England Joan la Warre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1346 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 17. August 1405 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Tisbury, Wiltshire, England und wurde in Christchurch Priory, Christchurch, Dorset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Joan la Warre il 24 maggio 1384, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1346. ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas West 1st Baron Westが1365年10月15日にイギリスハンプシュアイアオアクハンジャーで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Westは44歳，母Alice FitzHerbertは26歳であった。1384年5月24日にイギリスデボンでJoan la Warreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1346年に兵役登録をした。彼は1405年8月17日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアティスブリーで39歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスドールセトチリストチャーチチリストチャーチ プリオリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Christchurch Priory Churchyard, Christch: 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 크리스트c후르치 크리스트c후르치 프리오리
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas West 1st Baron West(이)가 1365년 10월 15일 영국 함프실르 k핸거에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas West(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice FitzHerbert(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1384년 5월 24일 영국 데폰에서 Joan la Warre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1346년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1405년 8월 17일 영국 윌츠히르 티스버이에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 크리스트c후르치 크리스트c후르치 프리오리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas West 1st Baron West nasceu em 15 de outubro de 1365, em Oakhanger, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas West, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Alice FitzHerbert, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan la Warre em 24 de maio de 1384, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1346. Ele faleceu em 17 de agosto de 1405, em Tisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em Christchurch Priory, Christchurch, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Christchurch Priory Churchyard, Christch: крисчурч приори, крисчурч, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas West 1st Baron West родился 15 октября 1365 г. в местности оахангир, хампшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas West было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Alice FitzHerbert, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan la Warre 24 мая 1384 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. В 1346 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 17 августа 1405 г. в местности тисбури, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности крисчурч приори, крисчурч, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Joan la Warre el 24 de mayo de 1384, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1346.
